message:
fix(core): prevent context duplication on API retry and strip dangling tool calls on error

Add Session::revert_last_user_message() which abandons the current leaf
user message, moving the leaf pointer back to its parent. This is called
in both the interactive (main.rs) and RPC (rpc.rs) retry paths so the
failed user prompt is not duplicated when re-sent.

Also strip ToolCall content blocks from error stop messages in the agent
loop to prevent sequence mismatches on the next user prompt, and expose
revert_last_user_message on AgentSession for the interactive path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
